subject: english
title: Tiếng Anh NTT 2022 — mã đề 123 (đề chính thức)
intro: Đề chính thức tuyển sinh lớp 6 — môn Tiếng Anh (mã đề 123).
_answerNote: Bản PDF là đề scan (chỉ khoanh câu Example), và bảng đáp án text kèm theo thuộc một mã đề KHÁC (không khớp). Đáp án dưới đây do Claude tự giải (câu Tiếng Anh khách quan) — cần đối chiếu key chính thức khi có.

passages.title: ADVENTURE WORLD
passages.body:
ADVENTURE WORLD
Open from March 14th to October 31st.
Free shows – 2pm and 4pm daily.
Prices: Over 12 – £24.00; Under 12 – £16.00

passages.title: CAKE-MAKING COURSE
passages.body:
CAKE-MAKING COURSE
Saturday 6 July, 9 a.m. – 5 p.m.
Top chef Frank Martin will teach you to make cakes and biscuits.
£50. Lunch in Frank's café.
Call Frank on 866354

passages.title: A message
passages.body:
Hi Lan,
I have my piano exam next week. The school is closed, and I need a piano to practise on. Please can I come to your house on Saturday afternoon and practise on your piano?
Thanks,
Huang

passages.title: The forest
passages.body:
Forests can be found all around the world. There are many different plants and animals that use the forest as their home.
In the forest, small animals eat the fruits, nuts, mushrooms, and insects. Larger animals eat smaller animals. Other animals eat seeds and shrubs. Most animals are scared of humans, but they are never far away. An ant, bat, snake, deer, or turkey may hide among the leaves, sit in the trees or run on the ground.
Many different types of trees live in the forest. Trees drop their leaves during the fall to save water on the floor of the forest. After the animals and plants die, their bodies break down. This makes the earth rich with nutrients.
Forests are fun places to visit. A person who wants to see and hear the real sounds of the forest must sit quietly and listen with his or her eyes and ears.

passages.title: Helping other people
passages.body:
Do you want to help other people but think you are too young? There are many opportunities for kids like you to do this. Some activities may seem small, but they make other people happy.
One activity you can do is to make greeting cards for people in a retirement home. You can brighten their day with a cheerful card. You can also visit them and read your card to them. You can read your favorite book to them, or play a card game.
Another group of people you can help is children in hospitals. You can visit a hospital and play board games with them. You might want to read picture books to the younger children, or give them some of your toys.
There are many things you can do to make someone's day brighter. You don't need money or a lot of skills. You can make a big difference in a person's life just by being willing to spend some of your time.

questions.stem: My grandparents live in the countryside, and I stay with ______ every summer.
My sister needs to go to the dentist. She has a ______.
When Galileo was eight, his family ______ to Florence.
Let's take this ______ of milk. It's cheaper.
I haven't got ______ pets, but my friend has got a rabbit.
We will ______ a boat trip around the island tomorrow.
You learn about wars and events in the past in this subject. What subject is it?
Excuse me! Where is the ______ room? I want to try these jeans on.
The opening ceremony of SEA GAMES 31 was ______ May 12th 2022.
The blue pencil case is ______ the red one.
I love swimming, and I go swimming three times ______ week.
Stand in line and wait for your ______ to get the ticket.
The first dinosaurs had short, fat legs and big heads, and they looked ______ very big lizards.
Complete the exchange. ______ — Mai: Excellent! Really good fun.

options.text: What did you see at the festival?
How did you know about the festival?
How did you go to the festival?

questions.stem: Hoa: Don't forget to tidy your room. — Nam: ______.
When do Adventure World shows end?
Which is true about the course?

options.text: The class starts at 9 o'clock every day.
You learn to make coffee in the course.

questions.stem: Why did Huang write this message?

options.text: To tell Lan that the school piano doesn't work
To invite Lan to come to her home on Saturday
To ask Lan to let her practise on her piano
To remind Lan that the school is closed on Saturday

questions.stem: What is the text about?
Which is NOT the food of small animals in the forest?
Which sound can you hear in the forest?
Fill blank (22) with ONE word from the text: You can bring happiness to other people by doing (22) ______ things.
Fill blank (23) with ONE word from the text: Some activities you can do are making greeting cards or playing games with old people in retirement homes or kids in (23) ______.
Fill blank (24) with ONE word from the text: One thing you need to help other people is your (24) ______, not your money or skills.

The following sentence has ONE word that is not correct. The correct word has the same pronunciation as the wrong one. Write the correct word.
The children are collecting would for the campfire.
Your primary school years are over. What was your happiest day at primary school? Write your answer in about 30-50 words.
